alert: P99 Latency SLA Breach - Enterprise Tier

annotations.summary: Enterprise tier P99 latency exceeds 2000ms SLA (current: {{value}}ns)
annotations.description: The payment service P99 latency for enterprise tier has exceeded the 2-second SLA threshold. Enterprise tenants expect sub-2s response times.
annotations.runbook:
1. Check CPU/memory metrics on payment-service pods
2. Look for correlation with fraud-detection latency (LLM calls)
3. Check if specific tenants are causing hot-path congestion
4. Consider scaling payment-service replicas
